text: Assalamu alaikum dear viewers today i will show you a operative video for gallbladder disease that is called the laparoscopic colic syndrome around ten to fifteen percent of the western population suffer from gallbladder disease but mostly asymptomatic about the eighty percent are asymptomatic gallbladder disease patient developed right upper pardon pain with history of radiation to the back, epigastric pain, dyspepsia, flatulence, nausea, vomiting. For this problem, laparoscopic polycystomy is the whole standard procedure. Let's see the operative pain.
